## Source: ghsa-malware (1a4feb0110c56fdee2c76c5c731f1f01e0b9c88027e7822bf73ca2ed1697690c)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (a6f4e556f55b516ccdd02700729877fa73287ece3920dfc7288d673ed337d5e6)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'monolith-twirp-pullsd-pullrequestinfo' @ 1.0.1 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.
